name: WiFi Watchtower
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or refine the WiFi Watchtower macOS menu bar app in `apps/wifi-watchtower`. Use when Codex needs the exact app workspace, repo-native doctor/typecheck/build/test flows, or menu bar and dashboard changes for local Wi-Fi trust scoring.
short_description: Run and refine the WiFi Watchtower menu bar app
default_prompt: Use $wifi-watchtower to work on the WiFi Watchtower macOS menu bar app in apps/wifi-watchtower: inspect the workspace, run doctor, and validate build or test changes around trust scoring, nearby Wi-Fi context, and the menu bar dashboard.
